privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims are verified. The task configures permissions for OpenSIS teacher profile (ID=2) to grant view and edit access to three real OpenSIS modules: students/Student.php, attendance/TakeAttendance.php, and grades/Grades.php. All module file paths exist in the official OpenSIS-Classic GitHub repository. The teacher profile must NOT have access to forbidden modules schoolsetup/Schools.php and users/User.php, which are verified to be real modules. The data used in the task is synthetic, generated by setup scripts that create an in-memory MySQL database with the required schema and initial state.
